ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pumpkin (cucurbita moschata), flesh without skin, raw

ingredients_text: Vegetable stock (water, leek, parsnip, carrot, turnip, onion) 32.98%, Butternut squash 32%, Reconstituted whole milk 12%, Carrots 10%, Cheddar cheese (milk) 6%, Pasta (durum wheat, egg white) 5%, parmigiano reggiano DOP (milk) 2%, sage 0.1%
